label: 186_participants_participants noted_business contacts_participants generally
description: Federal Reserve minutes from the intermeeting period detailed concerns about consumer spending, noting a greater-than-expected drop in energy prices and revisions to inflation projections. Participants discussed the impact of federal defense purchases and labor market conditions on overall economic forecasts.

earliest_articles.title: FOMC Minutes — 2010-01-27

The upward revision was in inventory investment; the staff's projection of the increase in final demand was unchanged.
